MOTION For Order Shortening Time To Hear Motion To Remove Action From Arbitration List
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Defendant's Motion to Removed Action From Arbitration List is heard this day. There being no appearance or an objection the tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted.Court ordered motion granted. Case is removed from Arbitration. Trial Date of 4/29/2002 at 9:30 AM, in dept 206 is ordered set. Court to give Ntc. of Trl date and to give Ntc. of MSC. Proposed order signed. Proceedings reported by: Ron Sinclair. (212)
